blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 155 ft. Looking ahead, 36 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
